case_title: STORM GRAPHICWORKS vs. KING, CHRISTINE IND & DBA THE MARKETING GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-03-1996, DISMISSAL COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IN CONTEMPT FOR NOT APPEARING AND FOR NOT FILING A DETAILED BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT.

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-01-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-01-1996, IF PLAINTIFF CONTENDS THAT THIS COURT HAS NO JURISDICTION TO REQUIRE A BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT, PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ON THE ISSUE NOT LATER THAN 8/26/96. IF A DETAILED BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT IS NOT FILED, AND NO GOOD CAUSE FOR FAILING TO DO SO, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-30-1996 CONTINUED FROM AUG-01-1996 TO SEP-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-30-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: $50.00 SANCTIONS ARE STAYED PENDING COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULES. (SET FOR PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER, ENTRY OF DEFAULT, ETC) PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFT. OF NEW DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-02-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-30-1995 TO JAN-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STORM GRAPHICWORKS

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-28-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-28-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT, TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION RULE, CASE QUEST FILED BY PLAINTIFF STORM GRAPHICWORKS SERVED NOV-14-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KING, CHRISTINE IND & DBA THE MARKETING GROUP
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-02-1996, CONTINUED TO JUL-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-02-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-02-1996, AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF DID PROVIDE COURT WITH A DECLARATION OUTLINING BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDINGS. HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STORM GRAPHICWORKS AS TO DEFENDANT KING, CHRISTINE IND & DBA THE MARKETING GROUP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-28-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-31-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-08-1995
NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY PETITION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STORM GRAPHICWORKS
